items.title: Mosaic plasmid-loss screen colonies
items.caption: Archived plate image showing mosaic colony patterns from a plasmid-loss screen.
items.alt: Cream-colored bacterial colonies with teal starburst centers arranged across a dark plate.

items.title: FtsL fluorescence response to arabinose induction
items.caption: Split-panel archive movie comparing FtsL-linked signal in uninduced and arabinose-induced cells.
items.alt: Split microscopy video showing clustered short cells at left and a filamentous cell at right, each overlaid with green puncta.

items.title: Pal and MreB tracking overlay
items.caption: Archived microscopy movie overlaying Pal, MreB, and tracking marks during clustered cell behavior.
items.alt: Microscopy video with magenta cell outlines, green MreB puncta, and multicolored tracking marks on a black background.
